name: Calculadora de Producto Escalar
description: Calcula el producto punto (escalar) de dos vectores tridimensionales.
seo_description: Calcula el producto punto (escalar) de dos vectores tridimensionales. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Introduce tus valores y obtiene.
example_label: Calculate results using the provided input values.

range_hints.by: Enter value within min-max range shown.
range_hints.ay: Enter value within min-max range shown.
range_hints.ax: Enter value within min-max range shown.
range_hints.bx: Enter value within min-max range shown.
range_hints.az: Enter value within min-max range shown.
range_hints.bz: Enter value within min-max range shown.

result_context: The calculated result provides the main output value.
steps: Calculate and display the dot result
mistakes: Not verifying input values are within realistic ranges for your scenario
Entering zero or negative values where positive numbers are required
Rounding intermediate results too early in multi-step calculations
